schema.purpose: BPHS Chapters 15-16 (plus classical Phaladeepika/Saravali) Raja, Dhana, Mahapurush and affliction yogas. Actionable rule schema with detection key, effect domains, weight, cancellation (bhanga) conditions, translations and provenance.
schema.approximate_verses: shloka-level references are placeholders pending Pandit verification
schema.note: Each rule is keyed by `yoga_key`, matched against the app's detectYogas() output via yogaEvidence(). `cancellation` lists classical bhanga (nullification) conditions the astrologer must verify; the app notes them but strength modifiers come from the shared exception engine.
schema.polarity: positive = beneficial yoga, negative = affliction/dosha, mixed = conditional

conditions.desc: Jupiter in a kendra (1/4/7/10) from the Moon.

cancellation: Jupiter combust or debilitated without neechabhanga
Jupiter in 6/8/12 from lagna weakens the result

translations.en: Gajakesari Yoga: Jupiter in a kendra from the Moon — grants intelligence, reputation, wealth and lasting fame.
translations.hi: गजकेसरी योग: चंद्र से केंद्र में गुरु — बुद्धि, यश, धन व स्थायी प्रतिष्ठा देता है।

conditions.desc: Sun and Mercury conjunct in one sign, Mercury not combust.

cancellation: Mercury deeply combust (< 3 deg) reduces the yoga
Sun-Mercury in dusthana (6/8/12) dilutes results

translations.en: Budhaditya Yoga: Sun with un-combust Mercury — sharp intellect, eloquence, learning and recognition.
translations.hi: बुधादित्य योग: सूर्य के साथ अनस्त बुध — तीव्र बुद्धि, वाक्पटुता, विद्या व सम्मान।

conditions.desc: Sun and Mercury conjunct but Mercury combust.

cancellation: Combustion suppresses expression of the intellect outwardly

translations.en: Budhaditya (Mercury combust): good intelligence but combustion muffles outward expression and recognition.
translations.hi: बुधादित्य (बुध अस्त): बुद्धि अच्छी पर अस्त से बाह्य अभिव्यक्ति व फल कम।

conditions.desc: Moon and Mars conjunct in one sign.

cancellation: If in 6/8/12 or both afflicted, gains come with stress or through disputes

translations.en: Chandra-Mangala Yoga: Moon conjunct Mars — earning ability, entrepreneurial drive and money-making skill.
translations.hi: चंद्र-मंगल योग: चंद्र-मंगल की युति — धन कमाने की कला, उद्यमिता व आर्थिक कौशल।

conditions.desc: Mars in own/exalted sign in a kendra (Panchamahapurusha).

cancellation: Mars combust or aspected by strong malefics reduces the yoga

translations.en: Ruchaka Yoga (Panchamahapurusha): strong Mars in a kendra — courageous commander, leadership, martial success.
translations.hi: रुचक योग (पंचमहापुरुष): केंद्र में बली मंगल — साहसी, पराक्रमी नेता, सैन्य/प्रशासनिक सफलता।

conditions.desc: Mercury in own/exalted sign in a kendra (Panchamahapurusha).

cancellation: Mercury combust weakens the yoga

translations.en: Bhadra Yoga (Panchamahapurusha): strong Mercury in a kendra — brilliant intellect, eloquence, commerce, scholarship.
translations.hi: भद्र योग (पंचमहापुरुष): केंद्र में बली बुध — प्रखर बुद्धि, वक्तृत्व, वाणिज्य, विद्वत्ता।

conditions.desc: Jupiter in own/exalted sign in a kendra (Panchamahapurusha).

cancellation: Jupiter in dusthana or combust reduces results

translations.en: Hansa Yoga (Panchamahapurusha): strong Jupiter in a kendra — wise, righteous, respected, fortunate, spiritual.
translations.hi: हंस योग (पंचमहापुरुष): केंद्र में बली गुरु — ज्ञानी, धार्मिक, सम्मानित, भाग्यवान, आध्यात्मिक।

conditions.desc: Venus in own/exalted sign in a kendra (Panchamahapurusha).

cancellation: Venus combust or afflicted dilutes comforts

translations.en: Malavya Yoga (Panchamahapurusha): strong Venus in a kendra — luxury, wealth, marital happiness, vehicles, artistic refinement.
translations.hi: मालव्य योग (पंचमहापुरुष): केंद्र में बली शुक्र — विलासिता, धन, दांपत्य-सुख, वाहन, कला-रुचि।

conditions.desc: Saturn in own/exalted sign in a kendra (Panchamahapurusha).

cancellation: Saturn afflicted may give authority through struggle

translations.en: Sasa Yoga (Panchamahapurusha): strong Saturn in a kendra — authority, discipline, command over people, lasting status.
translations.hi: शश योग (पंचमहापुरुष): केंद्र में बली शनि — अधिकार, अनुशासन, जन-नेतृत्व, स्थायी पद।

conditions.desc: Two house-lords exchange signs (mutual reception / Parivartana).

cancellation: Dainya Parivartana (involving 6/8/12) can give trouble instead of gain

translations.en: Parivartana Yoga: mutual sign exchange between two house-lords — the two houses reinforce each other's results.
translations.hi: परिवर्तन योग: दो भावेशों का राशि-विनिमय — दोनों भावों के फल परस्पर पुष्ट होते हैं।

conditions.desc: A kendra lord and a trikona lord connect by conjunction, mutual aspect or exchange.

cancellation: If either lord is combust, debilitated (without bhanga) or in dusthana, the raja yoga underperforms
Association with a dusthana lord can taint the results

translations.en: Raja Yoga (kendra-trikona): a quadrant lord linked with a trine lord — authority, high status, prosperity and success.
translations.hi: राजयोग (केंद्र-त्रिकोण): केंद्रेश व त्रिकोणेश का संबंध — सत्ता, उच्च पद, समृद्धि व सफलता।

conditions.desc: 9th lord (dharma) connects with 10th lord (karma) by conjunction, aspect or exchange.

cancellation: Weak, combust or dusthana-placed lords reduce the yoga's power

translations.en: Dharma-Karmadhipati Yoga: 9th and 10th lords connected — the most powerful raja yoga, fortune meeting action; great career and status.
translations.hi: धर्म-कर्माधिपति योग: नवमेश व दशमेश का संबंध — सर्वाधिक प्रबल राजयोग; भाग्य व कर्म का मिलन, उत्कृष्ट करियर व पद।

conditions.desc: A dusthana lord (6/8/12) placed in another dusthana (Harsha/Sarala/Vimala).

cancellation: Requires the dusthana lord to be otherwise unafflicted and connected only to dusthanas
If the lord also connects to good houses, the vipareeta effect diminishes

translations.en: Vipareeta Raja Yoga: a dusthana (6/8/12) lord in another dusthana — unexpected rise, gains through adversity and rivals' downfall.
translations.hi: विपरीत राजयोग: दुस्थान (6/8/12) का स्वामी अन्य दुस्थान में — विपदा के बाद अप्रत्याशित उन्नति, शत्रु-पराभव।

conditions.desc: 2nd lord (wealth) and 11th lord (gains) connect by conjunction, aspect or exchange.

cancellation: Involvement of 6/8/12 lords can bring debt or fluctuating income

translations.en: Dhana Yoga (2-11): the wealth lord and the gains lord connected — steady accumulation and income growth.
translations.hi: धन योग (2-11): धनेश व लाभेश का संबंध — स्थिर संचय व आय-वृद्धि।

conditions.desc: 5th lord (purva-punya) and 9th lord (bhagya) connect by conjunction, aspect or exchange.

cancellation: Afflicted or dusthana-placed trine lords reduce fortune

translations.en: Dhana Yoga (5-9): the trine lords of merit and fortune connected — prosperity through good luck, investments and past merit.
translations.hi: धन योग (5-9): पूर्व-पुण्य (पंचमेश) व भाग्य (नवमेश) का संबंध — भाग्य, निवेश व पूर्व-पुण्य से समृद्धि।

conditions.desc: Benefics (Mercury, Jupiter, Venus) occupy the 6th, 7th and 8th houses from the Moon.

cancellation: If those benefics are combust or weak, the yoga underperforms

translations.en: Chandra-Adhi Yoga: natural benefics in the 6th/7th/8th from the Moon — leadership, health, prosperity and a trustworthy nature.
translations.hi: चंद्र-अधि योग: चंद्र से 6/7/8 भावों में शुभ ग्रह — नेतृत्व, स्वास्थ्य, समृद्धि व विश्वसनीय स्वभाव।

conditions.desc: A debilitated planet whose debilitation is cancelled (neechabhanga) by classical conditions.

cancellation: Requires a valid bhanga condition (dispositor in kendra, exalted lord of debilitation sign, etc.)

translations.en: Neechabhanga Raja Yoga: cancellation of debilitation converts early weakness into extraordinary later rise.
translations.hi: नीचभंग राजयोग: नीचता का भंग आरंभिक कमजोरी को असाधारण उत्थान में बदल देता है।

conditions.desc: No planet (except Sun) in the 2nd and 12th from the Moon, and no planet with the Moon.

cancellation: Cancelled if a planet is in a kendra from the Moon or lagna
Cancelled if the Moon is aspected by or conjunct a benefic
Cancelled by a strong Gajakesari or planets in kendra

translations.en: Kemadruma Yoga: the Moon isolated (no planets in the 2nd/12th from it) — early struggle, mental unrest; readily cancelled by other yogas.
translations.hi: केमद्रुम योग: चंद्र एकाकी (उसके 2/12 में कोई ग्रह नहीं) — आरंभिक संघर्ष, मानसिक अशांति; अन्य योगों से सहज भंग।

conditions.desc: A planet debilitated without any cancellation (neechabhanga) condition met.

cancellation: Any valid neechabhanga condition converts this into a raja yoga

translations.en: Debilitated planet (no bhanga): weakness in the significations of that planet until dignity improves.
translations.hi: नीच ग्रह (भंग रहित): उस ग्रह के कारकत्वों में कमजोरी, जब तक गरिमा न सुधरे।

conditions.desc: Sun and Saturn conjunct in one sign.

cancellation: Benefic aspect or good dignity softens the friction
Can give disciplined success despite tension

translations.en: Sun-Saturn conjunction: tension between authority and duty — friction with father/superiors, but discipline can channel it.
translations.hi: सूर्य-शनि युति: सत्ता व कर्तव्य में तनाव — पिता/वरिष्ठों से मतभेद, पर अनुशासन से सफलता संभव।
